subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Tarbiyyat (Tablet of Education)
subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God and maidservants of the Merciful! The republic of wise men believes that the difference in minds and opinions is due to the difference of education
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و اماء رحمن جمهور عقلاء بر آنند که تفاوت عقول و آراء از تفاوت
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @differences in human capacity, @education and the development of capacity, @equality of men and women, @work as worship
